title: Include Time Tracking in mapping of items in Then create an item pop
excerpt: Hello Please include the time tracking in mapping of items so that it will also created to other board.

posts.author: philip.roque (Roque)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Please include the time tracking in mapping of items so that it will also created to other board.

posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @philip.roque!
For this exactly need our team has presented Time in Status add-on which helps to track time the issue has spent in each workflow status easily. So you can monitor how fast the issue moves between statuses. Great, isn’t it?

You’ll get user-friendly data on the board in a few seconds.

You can try it on the Monday Marketplace and share your experience with us.
Hope you find this add-on helpful.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI @philip.roque

Would recommend checking out the Clockify integration to automate your timesheets and reporting - search for ‘timesheets’ in the app marketplace and find instructional walkthrough support here.
